jobs.name: gemini-3am-config-review
jobs.prompt:
Run this command exactly once and wait for it to finish:

python3 /home/tphat/.hermes/scripts/gemini_repo_review.py

That script already uses Gemini CLI to review the following git repos and, when safe, stage, commit, and push changes:
- /home/tphat/.openclaw
- /home/tphat/.hermes
- /data/syncthing/obsidian-second-brain

After the command finishes:
- If it succeeds, summarize the JSON results concisely for the user.
- If any repo reports an error or the command exits non-zero, clearly report the failure and include the relevant error text.
- Mention when a repo was intentionally skipped for safety.
- Do not inspect .env files or credential files.
